pitch.aspect_ratio: layoutPitch uses canonical pitch dimensions and responsive canvas width
pitch.frame_time_labels: frame id and frame count visible; canonical match time visible outside canvas
pitch.color_accessibility: home blue and away red are distinguishable but no legend; corridor yellow may be low contrast on green for some users

corridor_overlay.current_source: PitchCanvas reads result.requested_evidence.target_player_id and current replay frame ball/player coordinates
corridor_overlay.source_marker_meaning: current ball position in selected replay frame
corridor_overlay.target_marker_meaning: current coordinates of target_player_id in selected replay frame
corridor_overlay.line_meaning_current: dashed line from current ball to target player
corridor_overlay.line_meaning_safe: candidate geometric connection between ball and target player for the selected relation witness
corridor_overlay.open_frame: not exposed in current requested evidence
corridor_overlay.close_frame: not exposed in current requested evidence
prohibited_claims: actual pass path unless ball trajectory confirms it
corridor_overlay.required_legend_text: A geometric corridor is a sufficiently clear forward connection from the ball to a teammate. It does not establish that this was the optimal pass.
recommendations: Request and project relation open_frame_id and close_frame_id before claiming temporal availability in the overlay.
Show the corridor only between relation open and close frames; outside that interval, fade or hide it.
Expose clearance and duration as human labels near the replay, not only as evidence aliases.
Add source ball marker, target receiver marker, and dashed hypothetical-connection legend.
Add actual ball trail separately and label it as observed movement, not corridor.

block_shift_overlay.current_mode: hidden when exact overlay geometry is unavailable
block_shift_overlay.baseline_defending_centroid: not present as projected replay geometry
block_shift_overlay.maximum_shift_centroid: not present as projected replay geometry
block_shift_overlay.displacement_arrow: not present as projected replay geometry
block_shift_overlay.ball_side_region: not present as projected replay geometry
block_shift_overlay.baseline_anchor_outcome_frames: scalar/evidence fields exist in plan but no exact overlay geometry is rendered
block_shift_overlay.recommendation: Keep hidden until exact baseline centroid, max-shift centroid, region, and frame anchors are projected from runtime evidence.

general_visual_recommendations: Move raw frame/replay ids to Developer details.
Use canonical match time in the replay header and frame id only in Developer details.
Highlight selected receiver with a stable label that is not just raw entity id.
Avoid overlays obscuring player markers by using thinner lines, halo, and fade.
